name: 24 Hour Vegetable Salad
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Green Onion, sliced with tops
recipeInstructions:
1. Place 2 cups of the lettuce in the bottom of a large bowl.
2. Sprinkle with salt, pepper, and sugar.
3. Layer the eggs atop the lettuce in the bowl; sprinkle with more salt.
4. Layer peas, remaining lettuce, bacon, and Swiss cheese on top.
5. Spread mayonnaise over the top, sealing to the edge of the bowl.
6. Cover and chill for 24 hours.
7. Garnish with green onion slices and paprika before serving.
